end,function(T,f)local o=Z(f)local V=function(V,i,N,k,D,s,S,A)return K(T,{V,i;N;k;D;s;S;A},f,o)end return V end,function(T,f)local o=Z(f)local V=function(V,i,N,k,D,s)return K(T,{V;i,N,k,D;s},f,o)end
